info.title: Axosoft API
info.description: Axosoft agile project management API v6 for software development teams. Manage features, defects, incidents, projects, releases, contacts, users, and work logs.

get.description: Returns a list of features with optional filtering, pagination, and sorting.

post.description: Creates a new feature work item.

get.description: Retrieves a single feature by ID.

get.summary: List available workflow steps for a feature

get.description: Returns a list of defects with optional filtering.
Returns a list of help desk incidents.
Returns a list of items across all types.
